title: clerodendrum sieboldii
intro: Clerodendrum sieboldii, also known as the Glory Bower or Japanese Glorybower, is a flowering plant native to East Asia. It is a deciduous shrub or small tree with clusters of star-shaped flowers in shades of pink, purple, and white. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The leaves and flowers of Clerodendrum sieboldii have been used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, to promote relaxation, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues.
